description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Flaunt your urban cool in ease with this Levi's T-shirt that is tailored to a beautiful finish. This tee is designed to offer a snug Fit and flaunt your chiseled body. Slip into a pair of richly hued jeans and sneakers, and throw on a tonal jacket to complement this trendy T-shirt. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
